---
title: "Merging Data"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(conflicted)
library(readxl)
library(crosswalkr)
```

```{r}
AirQuality <- read_csv(paste0("~/Documents/PROJECT-CLONES/Data-Storage/",
                              "AirQualityData/indices_QA_commune_IDF_2017.csv"))

Weather <- read_csv(paste0("/Users/antonioraphael/Documents/PROJECT-CLONES/",
                           "XCroissants-Predicting-Air-Quality/data/processed/",
                           "weather_2017_idf.csv"))

LandType <- read_csv(paste0("/Users/antonioraphael/Documents/",
                            "PROJECT-CLONES/XCroissants-Predicting-Air-Quality/",
                            "data/processed/Commune_Land_Data.csv"))

EnergyActivity <- read_csv(paste0("/Users/antonioraphael/Documents/",
                                  "PROJECT-CLONES/XCroissants-Predicting-Air-Quality/",
                                  "data/processed/Commune_Energy_Data.csv"))

Transport <- read_csv(paste0("/Users/antonioraphael/Documents/",
                             "PROJECT-CLONES/XCroissants-Predicting-Air-Quality/",
                             "data/processed/Commune_Transport_Data.csv"))

SocioEcon <- read_delim(paste0("/Users/antonioraphael/Documents/",
                               "PROJECT-CLONES/XCroissants-Predicting-Air-Quality/",
                               "data/processed/socio_eco_indicators.csv"), 
                        delim = ";", 
                        escape_double = FALSE, 
                        trim_ws = TRUE)


energy_indicators <- read_delim(paste0("/Users/antonioraphael/Documents/",
                                     "PROJECT-CLONES/XCroissants-Predicting-Air-Quality/",
                                     "data/processed/energy_indicators.csv"), 
                                delim = ";", escape_double = FALSE, trim_ws = TRUE)
```


```{r}
# Variables <- data.frame(Variable = names(energy_indicators))
# 
# write_csv(Variables,
#           paste0("/Users/antonioraphael/Documents/",
#                  "PROJECT-CLONES/XCroissants-Predicting-Air-Quality/",
#                  "data/processed/Energy_Names.csv"))

Crosswalk_Energy <- read_delim(paste0("/Users/antonioraphael/Documents/",
                                  "PROJECT-CLONES/XCroissants-Predicting-Air-Quality/",
                                  "data/processed/",
                                  "Energy_Names.csv"), 
                           delim = ";", 
                           escape_double = FALSE, 
                           trim_ws = TRUE)


energy_indicators <- crosswalkr::renamefrom(.data      = energy_indicators,
                                            cw_file    = Crosswalk_Energy,
                                            raw        = Variable,
                                            clean      = Clean_Names,
                                            drop_extra = FALSE)

energy_indicators <- energy_indicators |> 
  select(-c(Drop))

energy_indicators <- energy_indicators |> 
  mutate(ninsee = as.character(ninsee))

```


```{r}

# Variables <- data.frame(Variable = names(SocioEcon))
# 
# write_csv(Variables,
#           paste0("/Users/antonioraphael/Documents/",
#                  "PROJECT-CLONES/XCroissants-Predicting-Air-Quality/",
#                  "data/processed/SocioEcon_Names.csv"))

Crosswalk_SE <- read_delim(paste0("/Users/antonioraphael/Documents/",
                                  "PROJECT-CLONES/XCroissants-Predicting-Air-Quality/",
                                  "data/processed/SocioEcon_Names.csv/",
                                  "Sheet 1-SocioEcon_Names.csv"), 
                           delim = ";", 
                           escape_double = FALSE, 
                           trim_ws = TRUE)


SocioEcon <- crosswalkr::renamefrom(.data      = SocioEcon,
                                    cw_file    = Crosswalk_SE,
                                    raw        = Variable,
                                    clean      = Clean_Names,
                                    drop_extra = FALSE)

SocioEcon <- SocioEcon |> 
  select(-c(Drop))
```

```{r}
SocioEcon <- SocioEcon |> 
  mutate(across(where(is.character), function(x) {
    x <- as.character(x)
    x <- gsub(",", ".", x, fixed = TRUE)
    x <- as.numeric(x)
  }))

SocioEcon <- SocioEcon |> 
  rename(ninsee = Ninsee) |> 
  mutate(ninsee = as.character(ninsee))
```

```{r}
LandType <- LandType |> 
  select(-c(nomcom)) |>
  rename(ninsee       = insee,
         commune_area = st_areasha) |> 
  mutate(ninsee = as.character(ninsee))

```

```{r}
Transport <- Transport |> 
  mutate(ninsee = as.character(ninsee))

```

```{r}
EnergyActivity <- EnergyActivity |> 
  rename(ninsee = code_commune) |> 
  mutate(ninsee = as.character(ninsee))

```

```{r}
Weather <- Weather |> 
  rename(Date   = date,
         ninsee = insee) |> 
  mutate(Date = as.Date(Date,
                        format = "%Y-%m-%d")) |> 
  mutate(ninsee = as.character(ninsee)) |> 
  select(-c(latitude, longitude))

```


```{r}
AirQuality <- AirQuality |> 
  dplyr::filter(!ninsee %in% c("0",
                               "75",
                               "77",
                               "78",
                               "91",
                               "92",
                               "93",
                               "94",
                               "95")) |> 
  mutate(ninsee = as.character(ninsee))

AirQuality <- AirQuality |> 
  rename(Date = date) |> 
  mutate(Date = as.Date(Date,
                        format = "%d/%m/%Y")) |> 
  mutate(ninsee = as.character(ninsee))

```

```{r}
AirQuality <- AirQuality |> 
  left_join(Weather,
            by = c("ninsee", "Date")) |> 
  left_join(LandType,
            by = c("ninsee")) |> 
  left_join(Transport,
            by = c("ninsee")) |> 
  left_join(EnergyActivity,
            by = c("ninsee")) |> 
  left_join(SocioEcon,
            by = c("ninsee")) |> 
  left_join(energy_indicators,
            by = c("ninsee"))


```

```{r}
rm(list = ls(pattern = "Energy|LandType|SocioEcon|Transport|Weather|Crosswalk|energy"))
gc()
gc()
```


```{r}
write_csv(AirQuality,
          paste0("/Users/antonioraphael/Documents/PROJECT-CLONES/",
                 "Data-Storage/AirQualityData/PredictionData/",
                 "AirQualityData_Full.csv"))

```
